title: African Lessons
summary: This article describes Calestous Juma's efforts "to improve indigenous management and entrepreneurial skills in Africa" and highlights Going for Growth: Science, Technology, and Innovation in Africa (.pdf)—a collection of essays which emphasizes building Africa’s capacity to solve its own problems.
body: Note This article describes Calestous Juma's efforts "to improve indigenous management and entrepreneurial skills in Africa" and highlights Going for Growth: Science, Technology, and Innovation in Africa (.pdf)—a collection of essays which emphasizes building Africa’s capacity to solve its own problems. The discussion was continued in Mining Magazine 's June 2006 article " Money Matters " (.pdf).
